prompt: Create a bold Chinese promotional poster in a chaotic Mondrian-meets-Fauvism-meets-Cubism graphic style, with thick black outlines, irregular geometric color blocks, and a high-contrast palette of red, blue, yellow, white, and black. The layout is a dense single-page vertical membership campaign poster with multiple tilted panels and sharp angular divisions, like cut-paper collage and retro commercial poster design. At the top center, place a huge white trapezoid panel with oversized black Chinese headline text: "大会员" on the first line and "首次招募" on the second line, with the year 2026 in large bright blue numerals integrated into the headline. Along the left side, include 4 decorative icon/mascot elements: 1 circular bear-face logo in a yellow circle at the upper left, 1 blue-and-white clock icon below it, 1 half-body black-and-white bear mascot in the mid-left wearing a blue scarf and raising one arm, and 1 cropped bear mascot face at the bottom left. In the left-center, add a tall red countdown panel with white Chinese text "倒计时仅剩" at the top, an enormous yellow numeral "1" in the middle, and a large white "天" at the bottom. On the upper right, place a large white pricing panel showing the original price line "原价 ¥2999/年" with a strikethrough over 2999, then the discounted line "到手价" above a giant red price "¥1299/年". Beneath that, create a blue header strip labeled "省钱攻略" and divide the area into 3 vertical offer columns labeled 1, 2, and 3. Column 1 shows "领券立减" and a large blue "200" with a percent-style coupon icon below. Column 2 shows "拼团再减" and a large red "1500" with three simplified person icons in blue, yellow, and red below. Column 3 shows "成团即得" and a large red "¥730" with smaller black text "专属赠礼" and a gift box icon below. In the lower left, add a white benefits panel with a blue tab title "核心权益". Inside, place 2 small rectangular portrait thumbnails at the upper left, then to the right list 3 text rows: "AI × 家庭教育 × 元学习", a blue-highlighted name "howie" followed by black Chinese descriptive text, and a red-highlighted name "savage" followed by black Chinese descriptive text. Under these, include 4 bullet-like benefit rows with small blue icons: "全年直播陪伴，会员无限期回看", "会员专享逐字稿 + 三级笔记", "All in One AI 知识库 24*7 答疑", and "免费送一个家庭账号，和队友一起学". Across the lower middle, create a black horizontal strip with white text: "AI 内参 1 年（¥365） + 实物大礼包（¥365）". Below that strip, show 3 product images side by side: 1 magazine-style booklet cover, 1 orange notebook/book cover, and 1 blue book cover, plus 2 small round mascot badges near the products. At the bottom center, place a large blue call-to-action panel with big white Chinese text "扫码立刻拼团" and yellow subtitle text "— 锁定首发价 —", then a smaller line in white and yellow: "平均每天 3.55，撬动全家 AI 学习力！". At the bottom right, add a large black-and-white QR code in a white square. Along the very bottom, create 2 footer bars: on the left a blue strip with a shield icon and white text "价保承诺：180 天降价立即退差价", and on the right a red strip with a card/payment icon and white text "轻松支付：花呗 12 期分期免息". Use very heavy sans-serif Chinese typography, exaggerated scale contrast, dynamic asymmetrical composition, overlapping panels, and an energetic commercial poster feel for social media marketing.
